Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73178
Patient: MUSA LAHIQ - (MRN: 22463)
Visit Date: 2026-01-17 00:00:00
Diagnosis: T79-Certain early complications of trauma, not elsewhere classified

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (9 line(s), total difference: 0.09 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
  - Seq 22: MOHAPD2650 Claimed=2373.44 Approved=2373.43 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 11: MOHS-AD123 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01

  - Seq 6: MOHS-AD127 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 4: MOHS-AD124 Claimed=1732.23 Approved=1732.22 Diff=0.01
  - Seq 1: MOHS-B2066 Claimed=12854.04 Approved=12854.03 Diff=0.01

PACKAGE INCLUSION (1 line(s)):
  These services exceed the scope of the package and were provided as additional
  necessary care beyond the standard package components.
  Request: Approve as supplementary charges outside package scope.
  - Seq 18: MOHS-B1105 - SUTURING LARGE WOUND UNDER G.A. (SAR 1558.06)

QUANTITY EXCEEDED (1 line(s)):
  The quantities billed reflect the actual services provided based on clinical need.
  Extended treatment was required due to patient condition complexity.
  Request: Review and approve the actual quantities administered.
  - Seq 15: MOHAPSB001 Qty=1 (SAR 347.78)

CODE REFERENCE (1 line(s)):
  The service codes used are valid per the NPHIES coding guidelines and
  accurately reflect the services provided.
  Request: Accept the coded services as documented.
  - Seq 2: MOHS-B2042 - TENDONS REPAIR (SAR 15424.84)

---
